Privacy Policy for Image Optimizer Pro

Last updated: April 9, 2026

Introduction

Thank you for choosing Image Optimizer Pro. Your privacy is our top priority. This Privacy Policy explains our commitment to protecting your data while using our extension.

Our Core Privacy Principle

Everything stays on your machine. No uploads. No tracking. No data collection.

Data Collection and Usage

We do not collect any personal data, period.

The Image Optimizer Pro operates entirely locally on your device using the modern browser Canvas API for all image processing tasks.

  • No External Transmission: Your images are processed within your browser's local sandbox. They are never sent to our servers or any third-party servers.
  • No Browsing Data: We do not monitor, record, or transmit your browsing history or website interactions.
  • No Personal Identification: We do not collect names, email addresses, or any other personally identifiable information (PII).
  • No Cookies/Storage: The extension does not use tracking cookies or persistent storage for anything other than temporary session state required for functionality.

Permissions Usage

This extension is designed to be as non-intrusive as possible. It requires no special permissions (like "Read and change all your data on the websites you visit") to function. The processing starts only when you voluntarily upload or drag-and-drop an image into the extension popup.

Third-Party Services

This extension does not include any third-party analytics, advertisements, or tracking scripts. It is a clean, utility-focused tool.

Changes to This Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. You are encouraged to review this page periodically.

Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the official support channels of ANSLATION COMPANY.

© 2026 Saurabh Tiwari and ANSLATION COMPANY. All rights reserved.
